title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access the Colossus GPU cluster. The video argues that Anthropic lacks vertical integration compared to other frontier labs and relies on external partners for chips, cloud, and infrastructure. The commentary suggests the AI competitive advantage is shifting toward control of chips, energy, and datacenter infrastructure.
